decision_rules.improvement_observed: active promotion in enough seeds, adaptive debt AUC reduced by >=20%, bootstrap CI upper bound < 0, zero hard-floor regression
decision_rules.inconclusive_no_active_policy: active promotion is absent in most seeds
decision_rules.partial_support: active promotion exists and debt AUC is reduced by >=10% but confirmatory criteria are weaker
decision_rules.pipeline_failure_trial_timeout: trial runner timeout prevents promotion-readiness evaluation
decision_rules.regression_observed: hard-floor regression or unresolved obligations increase

scientific_limits: Replicated overnight pilot design, not a definitive benchmark.
Validators measure operational closure, not semantic truth.
No LLM judge, external evaluator oracle, or model-weight update is used.
All failed, rejected, and inconclusive OASG receipts are included in artifact counts.

decision_rules.improvement_observed: adaptive debt AUC reduced by >=20%, zero hard-floor regression, active promotion >=1
decision_rules.partial_support: active promotion exists and debt AUC is reduced by >=10% but confirmatory CI/threshold is weaker
decision_rules.pipeline_failure_trial_timeout: trial runner timeout prevents promotion-readiness evaluation
decision_rules.recovery_improvement_observed: post-burst half-life or MTTR improves by >=25%
decision_rules.regression_observed: hard-floor regression or unresolved obligations increase
